what: SaaS product hit $10k MRR in 6 months ($120k ARR), aiming for $20k soon. Organic growth focus.
why_us: Concrete validation of quick SaaS ramp-up timelines; signals demand for tools that help indie founders hit early MRR milestones or automate similar launches.

what: SaaS launched 8 months ago with no audience/ad budget, now $11.18k total revenue / $2.789k MRR via organic growth and user listening.
why_us: Strong example of bootstrapped organic SaaS success; highlights pain of customer acquisition without paid ads and value in iteration based on feedback.

what: Indie hacker with niche AI tools (insurance claims, vet notes, dev tools) generating $2k/mo total across 3 products with minimal marketing (1 follower on IH).
why_us: Demonstrates viability of hyper-niche AI wrappers solving boring industry pains; low-competition, expertise-driven opportunities for quick builds.

what: Users complaining about lack of notification features in art communities (e.g., ArtFight reload obsession) and specialized matching/proposal tools for commissioners.
why_us: Clear UX pain in creative marketplaces; opportunity for AI-enhanced notification/matching bots or apps.

what: Demand for advanced Telegram bots with real revenue share, trading utilities, and multi-use features in crypto/Web3 communities.
why_us: Recurring interest in monetized bots for trading/onboarding; aligns with automation category and easy AI integration.
